programme.title: O'Dessa
programme.desc: A farm girl embarks on an epic quest to recover a cherished family heirloom in the post-apocalyptic future. Her journey soon leads her to a strange and dangerous city where she meets her one true love. However, in order to save his soul, she must put the power of destiny and music to the ultimate test.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride or Die
programme.desc: When their late police captain gets linked to drug cartels, wisecracking Miami cops Mike Lowrey and Marcus Burnett embark on a dangerous mission to clear his name.

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery
programme.desc: Former Detective Jeff Jackson teams up with Dr. Zee Madeiras to track down their friend's missing emerald brooch, a thief and a murderer.

programme.title: Deadly Estate
programme.desc: When a hotel manager is wrongly accused of killing the soon-to-be new owner's son, she must use her hospitality skills to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Meet the Killer Parents
programme.desc: A young woman fights to escape her boyfriend's family after learning they're planning to groom her to replace their long-dead daughter.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: The inspirational true story of Jesse Brown, the first Black aviator in U.S. Navy history, and his enduring friendship with fellow fighter pilot Tom Hudner. Helping to turn the tide in the most brutal battle in the Korean War, their heroic sacrifices ultimately make them the Navy's most celebrated wingmen.

programme.title: Perfectly a Strangeness
programme.desc: In the incandescence of an unknown desert, three donkeys discover an abandoned astronomical observatory and the universe.

programme.title: Sullivan's Crossing

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: Soccer Mom Madam
programme.desc: A single mother establishes a high-end escort service that matches beautiful young women with the wealthiest and most powerful men in the city. She manages to keep her lifestyle hidden from her kids and others until the FBI starts to investigate her.

programme.title: Chris Redd: Why Am I Like This?
programme.desc: Chris Redd digs into his days of living life like a music video and realizing that even if he'll never be tall enough to dunk, he can still grow as a person.

programme.title: Corner Gas

programme.title: Riddled With Deceit: A Martha's Vineyard Mystery

programme.title: Flamin' Hot

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden Mysteries

programme.title: The Dark Knight
programme.desc: With the help of allies, Lt. Jim Gordon and DA Harvey Dent, Batman is able to keep a tight lid on crime in Gotham City.
